Description: Caption configuration representing the metric and the tag_by operations labels.
Array of filters applied to the panel. Accepts KQL/Lucene expression filters, filter groups, or raw Elasticsearch DSL filters.
Minimum and maximum font size for the tags.
If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this layer. Default is false.
Orientation of the tagcloud. Possible values: `"horizontal"`, `"vertical"`, `"angled"`.
Not used with ES|QL data sources.
Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
